stemHtml: The current time is 20:43 UTC. You are 14 minutes from the CMB VOR and are asked to provide an estimate. What is the correct response?

options.b: Estimate Charlie Mike Bravo-VOR twenty fifty seven.
options.c: Estimate Charlie Mike Bravo-VOR two zero five seven.
options.d: Estimate Charlie Mike Bravo-VOR zero eight five seven Papa Mike.
